examples: days of danger and nights of waking

meanings.definition: be awake, be alert, be there

examples: She woke up to the sound of the alarm clock

meanings.definition: arouse or excite feelings and passions
examples: The ostentatious way of living of the rich ignites the hatred of the poor
The refugees' fate stirred up compassion around the world
His words woke us to terrible facts of the situation

meanings.definition: cause to become awake or conscious
examples: He was roused by the drunken men in the street

meanings.definition: marked by full consciousness or alertness
examples: worked every moment of my waking hours
